breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Suspected Iranian attack on Kurdish dissident group in Iraq kills at least nine
breaking.summary: Iran did not immediately claim responsibility, but has repeatedly targeted Kurdish dissidents in Iraq ⁠

breaking.title: Russian recruits survive just 20-30 minutes on Ukraine frontlines: CIA chief explains why
breaking.summary: Russian soldiers face a brief battlefield life expectancy of minutes. AI-powered drones have become specialized, low-cost killing machines on the front. Ukraine's mastery of drone warfare acts as a significant equalizer in the conflict. This technological advantage has helped Ukraine hold off Russia's superior force. Both sides have experienced substantial casualties since the invasion began.

breaking.title: Several trapped after landslide buries homes in China's Chongqing
breaking.summary: State broadcaster CCTV said a local community worker noticed rocks falling from a hillside at around 8 am local time and issued an emergency warning. Authorities immediately began evacuating more than 60 residents, but the landslide struck at 9.08 am, trapping several people before the evacuation could be completed. Footage aired by CCTV showed a section of the hillside collapsing onto a cluster of riverside homes.

breaking.title: School bus crash kills at least 20 pupils in Uganda
breaking.summary: Dozens others, including school staff, were injured in the crash, suspected to have been caused by a mechanical fault.

breaking.title: Olympic cyclist admits to driving despite ban after crash that killed wife
breaking.summary: Rohan Dennis pleaded guilty to driving while disqualified after police pulled him over last month.

breaking.title: Trump revives election fraud claims ahead of U.S. midterms
breaking.summary: Mr. Trump portrayed the U.S. electoral system as dangerously exposed and urged lawmakers to adopt new restrictions on voting, despite scant appetite for the measures even within his own Republican Party

breaking.title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
breaking.summary: The law now allows the adoption of male distant relatives aged over 15 back into the imperial family.

breaking.title: Medical Body IMA Warns Maharashtra Hospitals' Shutdown Over Attack On Doctors
breaking.summary: Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre seen assaulting a doctor
